overall_status: BLOCKED — SEROTYPE, PROPER NAME, BRAND, ASSAY AND MANUFACTURER UNKNOWN

regulatory_records.current_status: The 15 July 2026 Drug Safety Update strengthened warnings for iatrogenic botulism, states units are not interchangeable and highlights unlicensed/counterfeit-product risks.

regulatory_records.current_status: FDA has issued warning letters and enforcement communications concerning unapproved, misbranded and counterfeit botulinum toxin products. XT100 has no authorised-product equivalence.
